tests.name: unauthenticated /contracts redirect to /login
tests.detail: Navigated to /contracts without auth → 302 redirect to /login page with username/password form

tests.name: login page renders correctly
tests.detail: Login form displayed with 用户名/密码 fields, 登录 button, demo account hints. Version v0.0.3.

tests.name: authenticated /contracts shows contract list
tests.detail: Logged in as admin/admin123, /contracts shows 4 contracts in table with status labels

tests.name: CSS loads correctly
tests.detail: All styles loaded, modern card-based UI, blue theme, status color labels
